final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer with enable and reset functionality. It selects between two 8-bit inputs 'a' and 'b' based on the enable signal 'en'. When 'en' is high and 'a' is non-zero, 'a' is sent to the output 'out'; otherwise, 'b' is forwarded. If 'en' is low or 'a' is zero, the output is set to zero.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input [7:0] a,
  input [7:0] b,
  input en,
  output reg [7:0] out
);always @(posedge clk, negedge reset) begin
  if (!reset) begin
    out <= 8'b0;
  end else begin
    if (en) begin
      if (a != 8'b0) begin
        out <= a;
      end else begin
        out <= b;
      end
    end else begin
      out <= 8'b0;
    end
  end
end

endmodule
